productDisplayName: Reebok Men Island Explorer Black Sports Shoes
description: Super lightweight and extremely attractive, the reebok Island Explorer is the perfect outdoor shoe. Complete with a laceless design and an outsole with a drainage system, these shoes will give you the kind of all-day comfort that your feet truly deserve - the next best thing to walking barefeet. Excellent for your Sports endevours and casual wear as well. Just be prepared for all the jealous glances you get!UpperSynthetic fabric upper for comfort, style and durabilitySynthetic overlays for added structure and styleContrast stitch detailing for added styleLaceless design for ease of wearing and removalVelcro fastener with brand name for a customized FitMidsoleMildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfortFabric lining for increased comfortContoured heel counter to add bounce, cushion and comfortOutsoleNon marking TPR outsole for better shock absorption and durabilityCircular suction lugs for better grip on all surfacesDrainage ventsShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
